title: 10 best herbal teas for lice
description: Kansas coneflower teas helps with lice because its unique combination of anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties provides a triple threat against these pesky parasites. The tea's active compounds, such as ursolic acid and isoquercetin, target the lice's life cycle, disrupting their ability to reproduce and survive on human hosts.
